categories.name: THE NEW YORK TIMES HOME & GARDEN

questions.clue: The Times reports that with their bright color, "Oriental" these & "American antiques go together like peas & carrots"
A report from Hong Kong covered a wealthy widow's $3 billion bequest to her adviser on this study of placing objects
A Times piece told readers about dogs trained to sniff out these insect infesters of the boudoir

final.clue: In Genesis 2:24 these 2 words are what a man shall do to his parents & then to his wife; add a letter to 1 to get the other
